\tzpentry{ID3600}{Poisson Field Strength Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3600 introduces Poisson Field Strength Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \{F, G\}_{\text{Poisson}} = \sum_i \left(\frac{\partial F}{\partial q^i}\frac{\partial G}{\partial \pi_i} - \frac{\partial G}{\partial q^i}\frac{\partial F}{\partial \pi_i}\right) + \sum_{ijk} \epsilon^{ijk} \omega^i \frac{\partial F}{\partial \omega^j}\frac{\partial G}{\partial \omega^k} \end{equation}
